# Semantic Summary Examples

These examples show the desired `semantic_summary` field for embedding-ready text.

## Example 1: Sequence semantic summary

```json
{
  "sequenceSlug": "science-secondary-aqa",
  "semantic_summary": "Secondary science sequence for Years 7-11 following AQA specification. KS3 builds foundational understanding across Biology, Chemistry, and Physics. KS4 offers Combined Science or separate sciences, each at Foundation and Higher tiers."
}
```

## Example 2: Lesson semantic summary

```json
{
  "lessonSlug": "lesson-slug-1",
  "semantic_summary": "Lesson introduces equivalent fractions, comparing fraction sizes using visual models, and applying the concept to simple problem-solving tasks."
}
```
